settings.heading: Light, shadow, and sound—believable presence without surveillance.
settings.lede: Kevin® simulates human activity the way burglars actually look for it: warm light through curtains, moving shadows, and everyday household sounds. No cameras. No microphones. Everything plays from local storage on the device.
settings.image_alt: Kevin® device — front view, studio product photo
settings.cta_subheading: Choose your color and buy outright with free delivery across Europe and a 3-year Swiss warranty.

settings.heading: Three layers of believable presence.
settings.body: Kevin® simulates people at home using AI-driven light, shadow, and sound—visible and audible from outside, exactly where burglars look first.

settings.image_alt: Kevin® light scenarios projected through a window
settings.title: Light scenarios
settings.body: Warm, changing scenes make rooms look actively used—not simply lit. Kevin adapts rhythm for day and night deterrence.

settings.image_alt: Kevin® moving shadow simulation visible through curtains
settings.title: Moving shadows
settings.body: Projected silhouettes suggest one or more people inside. Visible through curtains—exactly where burglars look first.

settings.title: Everyday sounds
settings.body: 70+ hours of built-in simulations plus your own uploads. AI-generated household sounds adapt to feel personal and less repetitive.

settings.heading: Deterrence before break-in.
settings.body: Alarms react after entry. Cameras record evidence and can fail when Wi-Fi is jammed. Kevin focuses on believable occupancy from outside—before anyone tests the door.

settings.image_alt: Wi-Fi jamming disables cameras — Kevin keeps simulating locally
settings.title: Jammer-resilient by design
settings.body: Even when burglars use jamming devices to disable Wi-Fi cameras and alarm systems, Kevin keeps projecting believable presence. Simulations are stored locally on the device—not streamed from the cloud.

settings.image_alt: Kevin® complements an existing alarm system
settings.title: Complements alarms and cameras
settings.body: Alarms detect intrusions—Kevin helps prevent them. It adds realistic presence simulation so burglars think twice before approaching. An extra layer that works alongside what you already have.

settings.heading: Privacy-first. Plug and play.
settings.body: Engineered and designed in Switzerland. Typical use around 9 watts. No installation, no wiring, no monitoring panel.

settings.title: At home, Kevin is more than security
settings.body: When you are not away, Kevin doubles as a Bluetooth speaker and lamp—so the device earns its place in your living room every day.
